danger_signals.visual_form: Empty stamina bar displayed along ring apron
danger_signals.meaning: Wrestler is vulnerable to pinfall; loss is imminent

danger_signals.visual_form: Isometric view shows spatial dominance in ring
danger_signals.meaning: Player wrestler is in danger of being pinned or thrown

danger_signals.visual_form: NPC partner knocked down or outside ring
danger_signals.meaning: Player must act quickly or team will be eliminated

safety_signals.visual_form: Full stamina bar along ring apron
safety_signals.meaning: Wrestler is in strong position; resistant to pinfall

safety_signals.visual_form: Player character centered in isometric ring view
NPC tag partner visible and standing in corner or ring
safety_signals.meaning: Team support available; can tag or request assistance

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Wrestlers use distinct color-coded trunks/attire to differentiate characters
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Professional wrestling ring; ropes, turnbuckles, canvas

faction_indicators.color_identity: Typically patriotic or heroic color schemes (Hulk Hogan: red/yellow; Ultimate Warrior: distinctive feathered attire)
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Wrestler-specific entrance gear and visual identity
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Positive crowd reaction (implied through gameplay advancement)

faction_indicators.color_identity: Darker or contrasting color schemes ('Macho King' Randy Savage: regal attire; Rick Rude: provocative gear)
faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Distinct wrestling attire and accessories (Savage's crown, specific color patterns)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Antagonistic positioning in championship mode progression

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: High-angle isometric view of wrestling ring established; both wrestlers positioned at neutral corners
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Both wrestlers start with full stamina; neutral stance waiting for input

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Wrestlers visible in grappling positions; stamina bars dynamically decrease as moves execute
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Input-responsive movement; wrestling move animations play based on player inputs and positioning

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Stamina bar visibly depleted; wrestler sprite may show exhaustion animation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Wrestler becomes susceptible to pinfall; opponent gains advantage in grappling exchanges

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: NPC partner visible outside ring in corner area
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player can command partner to attack; partner will engage NPC opponent when directed or tagged in

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Roster of undefeated wrestlers presented in 'Yourself' championship mode
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must sequentially defeat all 9 wrestlers; progression tracked implicitly through victory sequence

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: 3v3 formation visible in isometric ring; eliminated wrestlers removed from view
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Three wrestlers per team; pinfall eliminates one team member; match continues until one team fully eliminated

environmental_storytelling.technique: Wrestler character authenticity through moveset differentiation
environmental_storytelling.example: Each of 9 wrestlers (Hulk Hogan, André the Giant, Ultimate Warrior, etc.) has unique albeit small movesets that reflect their real-world wrestling personas
Professional wrestling ring with ropes, turnbuckles, and apron serves as universal arena; stamina bars displayed on apron reinforce wrestling match rules
Cover art featuring Hulk Hogan, André the Giant, 'Macho King' Randy Savage, Ultimate Warrior, Big Boss Man establishes celebrity wrestling lineup as game world context
Two-player mode allows both players to use 'Yourself' in different color shades with unique theme songs, establishing personal wrestler identity within WWF world

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Responds quickly to inputs; can execute powerful moves; dominates ring positioning
Slowed response; vulnerable to pinfall; cannot escape grapples easily; prone to being thrown
Standing idle; awaits tag or can be commanded to attack opponent from outside ring
Engages opponent; can be tagged out; gains/loses stamina based on action
Enters pinfall animation; player has window to perform pin or opponent escapes if stamina recovers
Removed from active roster in 'Yourself' championship progression; visual confirmation of advancement

notes: WWF WrestleMania Challenge uses a high-angle isometric view as its primary visual communication system. The stamina bar mechanic is the core danger/safety signal—depletion visually indicates vulnerability and imminent loss. The game communicates faction identity primarily through wrestler-specific attire and character roster (real WWF wrestlers with distinct color schemes and accessories). World state is manifested through stamina bar dynamics, wrestler positioning in the isometric ring, and match mode structure (1v1, tag, Survivor Series, championship). Environmental storytelling relies heavily on authentic wrestler representation and familiar professional wrestling match rules presented through the ring setting. The game contains no traditional narrative world-state complexity; instead, it communicates game state entirely through wrestling match mechanics and visual wrestler identity.
